summary: Frontend-only audit of JANLYFLIX. Login → profile selector → browse → detail modal → mobile/desktop layouts. All 12 requested validation points pass except season-switching could not be exercised live because the randomly-clicked card was a movie; code review of VideoModal confirms the smooth-transition implementation is correct.
action_items: Consider adding data-testid attributes to interactive elements (login inputs, profile cards, tabs, play button, season picker) to make automated regression tests more robust. Currently selectors rely on class names like .profile-card, .detail-tab, .season-picker-btn, .btn-primary which work but are brittle.

On mobile (390x844), Playwright reported the modal-backdrop intermittently intercepting clicks on .btn-primary inside the detail modal. Manual visual checks indicate the button is reachable, but worth verifying that no transition or pseudo-overlay is sitting above the buttons during the modal-open animation.
critical_code_review_comments: VideoPlayer.jsx: `sorted` is correctly memoised with useMemo; effect deps now include `current?.key` only with an eslint-disable comment, so no exhaustive-deps console warning was observed.

VideoModal.jsx: season-change effect (lines 34-42) keeps `seasonData` populated until the new season resolves and toggles `seasonLoading` only; episode-list receives a fade via `.is-loading` class and `key={s${season}-${ep.id}}` correctly forces React to remount episodes on season change.
VideoModal.jsx: body.style.overflow is reset to '' on unmount → body scroll restored correctly after close (verified in test).
ProfileSelector.jsx: KIDS profile auto-created via useEffect; `.is-locked` correctly applied when editMode && p.isKid; arrow scroll handlers exist in code but rendering removed from DOM as expected.
ProfileSelector still imports `ChevronLeft, ChevronRight` and keeps the `scroll()` helper that are now unused after removing the arrow UI — minor dead-code cleanup recommended.

VideoPlayer.jsx exceeds reasonable size for a single component (~230 lines) and mixes player state, controls UI, captions and language menu; consider splitting controls into a sub-component for maintainability.
App.css mobile rule `.rows-wrap { margin-top: 0 }` is applied — verified rows-wrap margin-top:0px on 390px viewport; hero and trending row do not overlap on mobile.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (11/11 validations passed; 1 not exercised due to random-card-was-movie)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. KIDS profile auto-seeded by ProfileSelector useEffect on first load.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth is fully mocked via localStorage. After login, KIDS profile is auto-added if missing. To exercise season-switching, click a TV show (e.g. 'The Boys' from the Series tab or any backdrop labelled 'Serie' in the modal eyebrow). Detail modal tabs are: Episodios (TV only), Sinopsis, Reparto, Similares. The detail-modal has class `.detail-modal` inside `.modal-backdrop`; clicking on backdrop closes the modal due to onClick={onClose}, while inner .detail-modal stops propagation. Mobile play-button clicks may need a small wait (~500ms) after modal opens before clicking due to fade-in animation.
rca of the issue: No bug RCA needed — all requested fixes verified working: (1) no arrows on profile selector, (2) profile-rail-centered active with KIDS permanent and 'Añadir perfil' tile shown, (3) KIDS shows lock badge in edit mode, (4) profile entry transitions to /browse, (5) no horizontal overflow on desktop (1440x800) or mobile (390x844), (6) row-card vignette wrapped in @media(hover:hover) so it does not appear on touch, (7) rows-wrap margin-top:0 on mobile prevents hero overlap, (8) detail-body fade transition on tab change, (9) season change keeps previous episodes visible and shows .season-loading-bar instead of 'Cargando episodios' text, (10) player controls (.player-vol-slider hidden <640px via CSS), (11) no React Hook exhaustive-deps warning for `sorted` (useMemo applied), (12) bottom nav appears on mobile in the screenshot (Inicio/Films/Busc icons).
